backend/main.mo: Main backend actor implementing OTP-based authentication (sendOTP, verifyOTP, signup) with access control, user profile management, and storage for OTP records, user profiles, and verified mobile numbers.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that transforms old user profiles (without id field) to new user profiles (with Principal id field) and initializes the verifiedMobileNumbers map.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting three OTP login flow features: send OTP, verify OTP for existing users, and new user signup flow with associated test IDs and component dependencies.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Text file containing JSON-formatted summaries of all frontend source files including pages, components, hooks, and utilities for the Tracky student syllabus tracking application.
frontend/index.css: Global CSS with Tailwind directives defining OKLCH-based color system variables for light and dark modes including background, foreground, primary, secondary, and chart colors.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Tracky application with root div and module script reference to main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main app component with TanStack Router setup, protected route wrapper using OTP authentication, automatic profile setup handling, and routes for login, dashboard, syllabus tracker, and subjects pages.
frontend/src/components/ChapterList.tsx: Component displaying chapters grouped by completion status with checkboxes to toggle status, study time display, chapter selection for timer tracking, and visual indicators for selected and completed chapters.
frontend/src/components/ChapterStatsCard: Displays a card showing completed and pending chapter counts with icons, plus total chapter count at the bottom.
frontend/src/components/DashboardStopwat: A stopwatch component with start, pause, resume, and stop functionality, displaying elapsed time in HH:MM:SS format.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main layout wrapper with header containing logo, navigation (Dashboard, Subjects, Syllabus Tracker), and logout button with responsive mobile menu.
frontend/src/components/MotivationalQuot: Displays a daily motivational quote selected based on the day of year from a predefined list of 20 quotes.
frontend/src/components/ProgressCard.tsx: Shows overall progress percentage across all subjects with a progress bar and trending up icon.
frontend/src/components/ProgressReport.t: Comprehensive progress dashboard displaying total subjects, chapters (total/completed/pending), and overall completion percentage with progress bar.
frontend/src/components/StudyGoalCard.ts: Allows users to set a daily study goal in minutes and tracks progress toward that goal with a progress bar and completion indicator.
frontend/src/components/StudyTimeCard.ts: Displays total accumulated study time in a formatted string (hours and minutes) across all subjects.
frontend/src/components/StudyTimer.tsx: A timer component for tracking study sessions per chapter, with start/pause/resume/stop controls and integration with the backend to save elapsed time in minutes.
frontend/src/components/SubjectCard.tsx: Displays a subject card with name, creation date, and a progress bar showing completion percentage fetched from the backend.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and manages an authenticated or anonymous backend actor based on Internet Identity, invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides Internet Identity authentication context and hooks for login/logout using @dfinity/auth-client, managing identity state and delegation validity.
frontend/src/hooks/useOTPAuth.tsx: Context provider and hook for OTP-based mobile authentication, storing mobile number in localStorage for session persistence.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for OTP auth, user profiles, subjects, and chapters; subject/chapter queries are stubbed as backend methods are not yet implemented.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for a blue-and-white theme supporting light and dark modes, plus utility classes for shadows and transitions.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that wraps the App component with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider for state management and authentication.
frontend/src/pages/DashboardPage.tsx: Main dashboard page that displays progress cards, study time, chapter statistics, motivational quotes, and a stopwatch using data from multiple query hooks.
frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx: Multi-step authentication page handling mobile number entry, OTP verification, and new user signup with automatic navigation after successful authentication.
frontend/src/pages/SubjectsPage.tsx: Page for managing subjects with a form to add new subjects and a grid display of existing subject cards.
frontend/src/pages/SyllabusTrackerPage.t: Page for tracking syllabus chapters by subject, featuring a study timer, study goal card, subject selector, and chapter list with add functionality.
frontend/src/utils/timeFormatters.ts: Utility functions to format study time in minutes into short (e.g., '2h 30m') and long (e.g., '2 hours 30 minutes') readable string formats.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting, storing, and managing URL parameters and session storage, supporting both regular and hash-based routing with persistence.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom color schemes using OKLCH, extended utilities, animations, and theme settings for the application.
project_state.json: Project state file tracking 'Tracky' student productivity app with OTP-based authentication, syllabus/chapter tracking, study timers, and progress reporting. Currently at version 19 with a known issue: OTP login flow not working in Version 8.
